---
title: "Tutorials"
description: "Hands-on tutorials for CompOmics proteomics tools and workflows."
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "posts/*.qmd"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
  sort: "date desc"
---

```{=html}
<header class="tut-head">
  <div class="tut-head-kicker">Learn</div>
  <h1 class="tut-head-title">Tutorials</h1>
  <p class="tut-head-sub">Hands-on, step-by-step guides and walkthroughs for CompOmics proteomics tools and workflows. Each tutorial pairs practical examples with the underlying methods.</p>
</header>
```
